caption: A man with short gray hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit jacket, is seated and facing left in a formal setting. He is positioned in front of a light-colored, slatted wall. To his left, a blue folder rests on a wooden table, and the torso and arm of another person in a dark suit are partially visible. The frames contain a consistent white banner at the bottom with the logo "ORCA" and the text "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs". Below this, a green bar displays the text "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a similar position, slightly shifting his head and expression while appearing to listen or speak. The background and on-screen text remain static throughout the clip.
